items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-V2-RELEASE-READINESS-CLAIM-AUDIT-001A and does not substitute a different Cell, goal, or implementation scope.
All changed files remain under the Cell allowed paths and no public-copy or runtime surface is edited.
The report uses docs/v2/KUSABI_V2_RELEASE_CLAIM_LADDER.md as the only L0-L4 claim basis and does not redefine release levels.
The report inventories at least README.md, package.json, docs/v2 planning surfaces, README-linked operations docs, and public MCP/tool text scope or known unknowns.
Recorded claims include ladder level, evidence class, evidence refs, evidence label, and allowed/blocker status.
The reported release level is supported by evidence and does not rely on inferred evidence for shipped claims.
Any claim above the supported level is recorded as a blocker with surface, text, reason, and required action.
UAMP, compliance, attestation, federation, tenant/user identity, backend parity, and legal/regulatory checks are recorded and do not become current shipped claims.
The PR creates report-first governance evidence only and does not add enforcement, workflow activation, required checks, branch protection, release, or publish behavior.
Diff, YAML, and JSON validation evidence is present and accurately reported.
The PR does not authorize public release, publish, enterprise readiness, UAMP conformance, backend parity, compliance, federation, or legal claims.
